2. Using `exp(-c6*x1)` modulation of the half-saturation which captures exponential concentration dependence

The best strategy is to use the proven Hill function but with a multiplicative (power-law) x1 dependence on half-saturation rather than additive, since protein aggregation kinetics often follow power-law concentration dependencies:
